title: Gold — object-by-epoch snapshot row
description: One row per (object_id, epoch_index). Availability mask tracks which brokers/experts contributed.

availability_mask.description: broker/expert name → bool indicating whether output was available at this epoch

features.description: Photometric and contextual features at this epoch

broker_scores.description: Broker-field → canonical_projection (or null). Preserves semantic_type metadata.

target_label.description: Ternary ground truth label — null when unlabelled.

label_source.description: Provenance of target_label (e.g. TNS, ALeRCE-lc, manual)
